overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn featuring the protagonist Aloy traversing a lush prehistoric landscape during golden hour. The character walks along a dirt trail through dense tropical vegetation, approaches a stream, crosses the shallow water, and continues onto rocky terrain while a distinctive tall red rock formation remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical savanna trail with dense undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt trail surrounded by lush vegetation, heading toward the distant rock formation

entered.detail: massive reddish rock spire with vegetation on top, visible in the distance
cluster of tall palm trees lining the left side of the trail
cluster of tall palm trees lining the right side of the trail
dense green ferns and broad-leafed plants flanking the path
dense green ferns and broad-leafed plants flanking the path
winding dirt path through the vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail surrounded by dense tropical vegetation and large fern patches. Palm trees line both sides of the path while a massive red rock formation looms prominently in the center distance ahead.

events.description: dense vegetation opens up to reveal a stream on the right side
character turns slightly right toward the water's edge while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail as it opens into a grassy riverside area, approaching the stream visible to the right

entered.detail: shallow waterway with clear water running parallel to the path
tall golden grass growing along the edge of the stream

segments.scene_description: The dense vegetation gives way to a more open riverside area with tall grassy banks. The stream becomes visible on the right as the character continues forward, and the red rock formation shifts toward the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream crossing with rocky bed

events.description: character steps from the dirt bank into the shallow stream water
character wades through the water creating splashes and ripples

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream water, moving steadily across the rocky stream bed

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible rocks and pebbles on the stream bed
smooth stones and boulders partially submerged in the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow stream, wading through clear water with visible rocky banks and submerged stones. The water creates splashes as the character moves steadily across toward the opposite shore.

events.description: character exits the water onto dry rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the stream and continuing across the uneven rocky shore

entered.detail: uneven rocky ground with patches of dry grass and small boulders
clumps of golden grass growing between the rocks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the water, the character traverses the rocky shoreline with dry grass tufts growing between the stones. The stream falls behind as the character continues forward, with the red rock formation now appearing closer on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush tropical wilderness that transitions from a dense forest trail to an open rocky shoreline. It begins with the character walking along a winding dirt path flanked by palm trees and large fern patches, with a massive red rock formation looming in the center distance. As the dense vegetation gives way to open grassy banks, the scene shifts toward a riverside area where the red rock formation moves toward the left of the frame. The camera then follows the character as they wade through the clear, shallow water of a stream, creating splashes against submerged stones before emerging onto the opposite shore. Finally, the movement continues across a rocky shoreline dotted with dry grass tufts, leaving the stream behind as the red rock formation appears closer on the left.
